title: taraxacum schmidianum
intro: Taraxacum schmidianum, also known as the Alpine Dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. Its medicinal properties include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, making it a natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum schmidianum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the Alpine Dandelion can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
